_comment: Portable demo — run /cutscene play demo anywhere. relative=true means keyframe x,y,z are OFFSETS from your eye at play time (yaw/pitch are absolute degrees). The camera rises, pans a slow arc, then returns; you are dropped into spectator for it and restored to your exact spot + game mode after. For a REAL scene, set relative=false and use absolute world coords, add optional doublePreset (an Easy NPC humanoid preset that bakes Tags:["ci_cutscene_double"] + SkinType PLAYER_SKIN) for a stand-in you, and drive the beat with cues (title / sound / command). Trigger from a dialog button with: cutscene play <id>.
